creator: Martin Garcia
description: Investigates efficacy of constructed wetlands combined with biochar filters.

A master's student completes a 300-page thesis on wastewater treatment using constructed wetlands. The university library needs to preserve it, make it discoverable in Google Scholar, track thesis statistics, and enable reuse by other environmental engineers.

Library Impact: The university library catalogs this thesis in 15 minutes (simple DC structure); Google Scholar indexes it automatically; within 6 months, the thesis receives 47 citations—impossible without proper DC metadata.
subject: Constructed Wetlands
Biochar Filtration
Water Treatment
title: Efficacy of Constructed Wetlands with Biochar Filters
